description: Jinja2 is a fast, expressive, extensible templating engine. Used to render exploit HTML, payloads, etc.

documentation.example: from jinja2 import Template; print(Template('hi {{ n }}').render(n='x'))
documentation.how_to_use: Run the primary entrypoint as shown in upstream docs, e.g. `cd toolboxes/jinja2 && python3 jinja2.py --target $KFIOSA_TARGET_HOST`. Further invocations from upstream: `cd toolboxes/jinja2 && python3 jinja2.py --help`; `cd toolboxes/jinja2 && python3 jinja2.py --help`. Templating engine.
documentation.when_to_use: Use during the 'any' phase against surfaces [web] in the utility category. Fits when the engagement needs: Templating engine.
documentation.why_to_use: Prefer this tool because: Templating engine.

metadata.example: from jinja2 import Template; print(Template('hi {{ n }}').render(n='x'))

name: jinja2

trust.notes: Operator-curated Python library. The pip name is resolved from PyPI; the import name is verified against the registry.
